hypothesis.hypothesis: Raising score_threshold to 7.0 will eliminate the lowest-conviction entries (6.0–6.9 range) and increase win rate above 50% by filtering for higher-quality setups only.
hypothesis.pending_note: Next cycle: consider reducing debit_high from 1000 to 750 and debit_mid from 500 to 350 to enforce tighter premium discipline on remaining high-scoring entries. Also monitor DTE data logging—missing DTE values in recent trades complicates position-decay analysis.
